title: Questions
wikitext:
[]: Questions             Quote Post by Someone » Sun May 01, 2011 12:29 pm There are still a few things i must have missed in NGE. And now these questions keep buzzing around in my head. Please be so kind to help me answer them: 1-What happend to EVA unit 04 and who was the pilot? 2-Why were Shinjii and Rei having sex in EOE? It kinda came out of nowhere. 3-Who sings the ending song from episode 8? I recognize that voice, but i can't really place it. 4-Does evangelion have some kind of sequel? (not a remake, unless that is in fact a sequel) 5-It noticed that, at the End of End of Evangelion Asuka's eyes were brown. And her mouth disappeared...? And i fail to see why Shinji tries to choke her in the first place. (beside the fact that he might have gone insane) Thanks for asweriiiiiing.

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun May 01, 2011 12:39 pm Someone wrote: 1-What happend to EVA unit 04 and who was the pilot?

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun May 01, 2011 12:44 pm Someone wrote: There are still a few things i must have missed in NGE. And now these questions keep buzzing around in my head. Please be so kind to help me answer them: 1-What happend to EVA unit 04 and who was the pilot? 2-Why were Shinjii and Rei having sex in EOE? It kinda came out of nowhere. 3-Who sings the ending song from episode 8? I recognize that voice, but i can't really place it. 4-Does evangelion have some kind of sequel? (not a remake, unless that is in fact a sequel) 5-I forgot question 5... Thanks for asweriiiiiing.

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by MaskedOmega » Sun May 01, 2011 9:10 pm Azathoth wrote: Opinion is sharply divided as to whether the recent New Theatrical Edition of Evangelion movies (popularly known as Rebuild of Evangelion) are sequel, remake, or something else.

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 01, 2011 9:50 pm MaskedOmega wrote: I still do not get this, why do people think Rebuild is a sequel? It does not come after NGE. Rebuild is just a remake of NGE with a lot of changes.

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by MaskedOmega » Sun May 01, 2011 11:08 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Because the oceans are red, there are huge cross shappend outlines, the blood smear on the moon, and Kaworu's lines make it seem like he already knows Shinji. There's other details, but those are the main ones that come to mind for me.

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 02, 2011 12:42 am MaskedOmega wrote: The oceans turned red after the second impact. The other ones I will have to get back to you on.

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by Someone » Mon May 02, 2011 3:40 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Because the oceans are red, there are huge cross shappend outlines, the blood smear on the moon, and Kaworu's lines make it seem like he already knows Shinji. There's other details, but those are the main ones that come to mind for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 02, 2011 4:17 am The usual "Rebuild=Sequel" image, which surprisingly I couldn't find in any obvious threads

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Mon May 02, 2011 4:20 am Aha, i remember question 5.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 02, 2011 4:31 am Someone wrote: Aha, i remember question 5.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Mon May 02, 2011 5:09 am ^Damn you light effects.

Article: Questions
[]: Questions             Quote Post by Someone » Sun May 01, 2011 12:29 pm There are still a few things i must have missed in NGE. And now these questions keep buzzing around in my head. Please be so kind to help me answer them: 1-What happend to EVA unit 04 and who was the pilot? 2-Why were Shinjii and Rei having sex in EOE? It kinda came out of nowhere. 3-Who sings the ending song from episode 8? I recognize that voice, but i can't really place it. 4-Does evangelion have some kind of sequel? (not a remake, unless that is in fact a sequel) 5-It noticed that, at the End of End of Evangelion Asuka's eyes were brown. And her mouth disappeared...? And i fail to see why Shinji tries to choke her in the first place. (beside the fact that he might have gone insane) Thanks for asweriiiiiing.
